prompt: Clean up the card icon background logic in Benefits.tsx. The nested ternary is hard to read. Use a mapping or a helper to make it more readable.

assertions.name: Removes nested ternary
assertions.text: The nested ternary for the card icon background has been replaced with a mapping or helper.

assertions.name: Maintains visual consistency
assertions.text: The gradient colors and intensities remain consistent with the original design.
